response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and data-integration systems, with exposure to high-throughput services at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby and current AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, telemetry foundations, or growth/measurement systems — the core focus of this Principal IC6 role. Technical leadership is demonstrated through workshops, talks, and founding GISCollective, but there is limited evidence of multi-team architectural ownership at enterprise scale or partnering with Data Science on statistical analysis and bias detection.
strengths: Polyglot engineer (TS/JS, C/C++, Java, C#, Python-adjacent, DLang) with production experience at scale
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev, pairing, testing tooling)
Active in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at current role
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation, feature-flagging, or A/B testing platforms
Limited evidence of cross-team/multi-workstream principal-level leadership at enterprise scale
Lacks explicit data-science partnership, statistical analysis, or bias/guardrail experience
